Table.Name: Command
Table.Command:
DECLARE @ServiceId INTEGER SET @ServiceId = {?DOCKEY@}
SELECT T0.custmrName, T0.itemCode, T0.itemName, T0.manufSN, T0.internalSN, T0.callID, T0.createDate, T0.createTime, T0.subject, T0.priority, T0.descrption, T0.resolution, T1.Tel1, T1.Name AS 'ContactName', T2.Name AS 'CallStatus', T3.Name AS 'Origin', T4.Name AS 'ProblemType', T5.Name AS 'CallType', T6.lastName AS 'TechnicianLastName', T6.firstName AS 'TechnicianFirstName', T7.U_NAME AS 'AssignedTo' FROM OSCL T0 LEFT JOIN OCPR T1 ON T0.contctCode = T1.CntctCode JOIN OSCS T2 ON T0.status = T2.statusId LEFT JOIN OSCO T3 ON T0.origin = T3.originID LEFT JOIN OSCP T4 ON T0.problemTyp = T4.prblmTypID LEFT JOIN OSCT T5 ON T0.callType = T5.callTypeID LEFT JOIN OHEM T6 ON T0.technician = T6.empID LEFT JOIN OUSR T7 ON T0.assignee = T7.USERID WHERE T0.callID = @ServiceId

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition: switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Oprettet den', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Erstellt am', True, 'Created on' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Kaldart', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Art des Abrufs', True, 'Call Type' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Behandlet af', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Bearbeitet von', True, 'Assigned to'//Default English )
